query:
SELECT
  SUBSTRING(paid_at, 9, 2) AS day_num,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN 0
           WHEN is_close_row = 1 THEN 0
           ELSE COALESCE(total_amount, 0) + COALESCE(overpaid, 0) END) AS kw,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_close_row = 1 AND is_bad_debt_row = 0
           THEN COALESCE(total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS close_amount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1
           THEN COALESCE(bad_debt, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sell
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'fastfone365'
  AND SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 7) = '2026-04'
  AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND paid_at != ''
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(paid_at, 9, 2)
ORDER BY day_num ASC

SELECT
  SUBSTRING(paid_at, 9, 2) AS day_num,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN 0
           WHEN is_close_row = 1 THEN 0
           ELSE COALESCE(total_amount, 0) + COALESCE(overpaid, 0) END) AS kw,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_close_row = 1 AND is_bad_debt_row = 0
           THEN COALESCE(total_amount, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS close_amount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1
           THEN COALESCE(bad_debt, 0) ELSE 0 END) AS sell
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'fastfone365'
  AND SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 7) = '2026-04'
  AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND paid_at != ''
GROUP BY SUBSTRING(paid_at, 9, 2)
ORDER BY day_num ASC
